query:
SELECT 
  c.code, 
  c.title,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.content IS NOT NULL AND l.content != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lessons_with_content
FROM courses c
LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId
WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%'
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.title
ORDER BY c.code;
